ValidationRule.description: Requires Context Class Name for custom objects when Formula is set. Standard objects and Foobar__c have built-in contexts. Uses suffix matching for Foobar__c to handle namespace prefix.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(EntryCriteriaFormula__c), ISCHANGED(EntryCriteriaContextClassName__c) ), NOT(ISBLANK(EntryCriteriaFormula__c)), ISBLANK(EntryCriteriaContextClassName__c), NOT( OR( CONTAINS( "|Account|Campaign|Case|Contact|Event|Lead|Opportunity|Task|User|", "|" & TriggerSetting__r.SObjectType__c & "|" ), RIGHT(TriggerSetting__r.SObjectType__c, 9) = "Foobar__c" ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Custom objects require a Context Class Name. Standard objects (Account, Contact, Lead, Opportunity, Case, Campaign, Task, Event, User) and Foobar__c use built-in contexts automatically.
